function.name: find_contextual_documentation
function.description: Use this tool to retrieve documentation or answers based on a user's question and predefined business context.

s_context_name.description:
The context to route the user's question to. This parameter determines which specialized NVIDIA copilot or tool will handle the query. The available contexts cover various domains including:
- Hardware Architecture (CPU, GPU, Tegra)
- Design Verification and Testing
- Infrastructure and Tools
- Software Development
- VLSI and ASIC Design
- System Design and Integration
- Performance Analysis
- Documentation and Support

Each context is a specialized AI assistant trained on specific NVIDIA internal documentation, tools, and workflows. The contexts are organized by domain prefixes:
- atg-*: ATG CAD and PRM related tools
- cpu-*: CPU architecture and infrastructure
- ghw-*: GPU hardware and architecture
- hwinf-*: Hardware infrastructure and tools
- hwip-*: Hardware IP and StepStone
- hwteg-*: Tegra hardware and SOC
- hwt-*: Hardware testing
- swauto-*: Software automation
- swrobotics-*: Robotics software
- swteg-*: Tegra software
- vlsi-*: VLSI and ASIC design

Each context has specific expertise in its domain and can provide detailed answers about tools, workflows, documentation, and best practices within its scope.
